kubeconfigPath.description: Custom path to kubeconfig file (defaults to ~/.kube/config). SECURITY: Ensure file permissions are 600, readable only by current user.

defaultContext.description: Default Kubernetes context to use. SECURITY: Recommend using non-production context.

hosts.description: SSH target hosts for sys-monitor skill. SECURITY: Only configure trusted hosts, prefer SSH key authentication over passwords.

password.description: SECURITY: Avoid storing passwords. Use SSH key authentication instead.

privateKeyPath.description: Path to SSH private key. Ensure file permissions are 600.
